---
title: ""
listing:
  - id: latest-posts
    contents: posts
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
    categories: false
  - id: latest-innovations
    contents: 
      - title: "Spectral Reflectance Curve"
        description: "Analyze spectral signatures across multiple bands."
        path: "https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/spectral"
        image: "https://placehold.co/400x200/2c7da0/ffffff?text=Spectral+Curve"
      - title: "Phenology Signature"
        description: "Crop classification based on phenological patterns."
        path: "https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/signature"
        image: "https://placehold.co/400x200/2c7da0/ffffff?text=Phenology+App"
      - title: "GEE AI Assistant"
        description: "Gemini-powered coding assistant for Earth Engine."
        path: "software.qmd"
        image: "images/geeai.jpg"
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
  - id: recent-pubs
    contents:
      - title: "Agricultural drought monitoring using GEE"
        description: "Study of Paschim Medinipur district, West Bengal (2024)."
        path: "publications.qmd"
      - title: "Flood vulnerability mapping in Odisha"
        description: "AHP-based study in Google Earth Engine (2025)."
        path: "publications.qmd"
      - title: "Drought Monitoring with Gemini API"
        description: "Presentation at GDG Earth Engine Nairobi."
        path: "publications.qmd"
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
page-layout: full
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-5 .profile-column}
::: {.profile-card}
<div class="profile-img-container">
<img src="images/pulakesh.jpg" class="profile-img" alt="Pulakesh Pradhan">
</div>

# Pulakesh Pradhan

::: {.social-links}
[<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/pulakeshpradhan/){.social-btn}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Github](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/){.social-btn}
[<i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=_DhEQHEAAAAJ){.social-btn}
[<i class="bi bi-youtube"></i> YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@SpatialGeography){.social-btn}
[<i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email](mailto:pulakesh.mid@gmail.com){.social-btn}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-7 .bio-column}
::: {.bio-text}
I am a Geographer and Spatial Data Scientist specialized in GIS and Remote Sensing. My work leverages Google Earth Engine (GEE), Machine Learning, and Cloud Computing to solve complex environmental and spatial problems. I have developed several [apps and packages](software.qmd) (like `geeadvance` and `deepgee`) and [tutorials](blog.qmd) to simplify geospatial workflows for the research community.

Currently, I am exploring the fusion of Artificial Intelligence with Earth Observation data to improve agricultural monitoring and disaster management. I am passionate about open-source development and academic research in spatial science.
:::

[**View full CV →**](cv.qmd){.cv-link}
:::

:::

<hr>

## 📌 Latest Insights
::: {#latest-posts}
:::

<hr>

## 🚀 Featured Innovations
::: {#latest-innovations}
:::

<hr>

## 📚 Recent Work
::: {#recent-pubs}
:::

[View all publications →](publications.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .mt-3}
